title: Fix CommandCenterUI hcom identity UX
description: Make CommandCenterUI explain and handle hcom sender identity like a usable command-center app, instead of exposing confusing browser-only backend errors. Preserve audit attribution and avoid silently sending as codex-lab-maki.
acceptance_criteria: UI clearly explains current hcom sender mode and how to enable sending
Default mode does not falsely attribute operator messages to codex-lab-maki
Read-only MAP status remains usable without send identity
